title: helichrysum panormitanum subsp. melitense
intro: Helichrysum panormitanum subsp. melitense is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the Maltese Islands, and is also known as the Maltese Everlasting. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, reducing pain and swelling, and preventing infection. The health benefits of Helichrysum panormitanum subsp. melitense include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve mood, and promote relaxation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of conditions such as arthritis and eczema. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
